response.global_analysis: The video features dialogue between multiple characters (Gigi, Bae, and Biboo) in a 3D simulation game setting. No vocal music or lyrics are present. Subtitles have been generated based on the spoken dialogue and on-screen events, with timings precisely aligned to the audio waveform. I have discarded the reference JSON lyrics as they were not applicable to this video segment.
